expectations.text: Checks if pnpm is installed or offers to install it
expectations.evidence: Skill doesn't instruct checking pnpm when user already ran npm install
Step 2: copies .env.example to .env when it doesn't exist

expectations.text: Asks user for their Anthropic API key
expectations.evidence: Step 2: uses AskUserQuestion to request the key

expectations.text: Does not echo API key to terminal output
Presents both localhost:3000 and localhost:5173 URLs
Follows correct order: install -> env config -> start services
Acknowledges user already attempted install, doesn't ignore their context
expectations.evidence: Skill runs pnpm install unconditionally with no acknowledgment of user's prior npm install. Analysis: 'the skill does NOT check for an existing node_modules directory'
